testcase.name: test_me_returns_super_admin_role

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected super_admin, got: None assert None == 'super_admin' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd93de4f3100>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd93de4f3100> = {'address': {'city': 'Test City', 'country': 'USA', 'customer_id': '0be90bfa-57e4-4c94-b5c5-88b59601c260', 'id': 'bed71923-eb69-42cc-9bdc-2d51d5b8ac82', ...}, 'customer': {'allow_bank_transfer': False, 'allow_card_payment': True, 'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'created_at': '2026-02-20T02:59:54.026607+00:00', ...}, 'user': {'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'email': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'full_name': 'Test User Updated', 'id': 'ef402b8d-5400-4fd7-b972-3ae32c3d6f75', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_admin_features.py:61: in test_me_returns_super_admin_role assert data.get("role") == "super_admin", f"Expected super_admin, got: {data.get('role')}" E AssertionError: Expected super_admin, got: None E assert None == 'super_admin' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd93de4f3100>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd93de4f3100> = {'address': {'city': 'Test City', 'country': 'USA', 'customer_id': '0be90bfa-57e4-4c94-b5c5-88b59601c260', 'id': 'bed71923-eb69-42cc-9bdc-2d51d5b8ac82', ...}, 'customer': {'allow_bank_transfer': False, 'allow_card_payment': True, 'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'created_at': '2026-02-20T02:59:54.026607+00:00', ...}, 'user': {'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'email': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'full_name': 'Test User Updated', 'id': 'ef402b8d-5400-4fd7-b972-3ae32c3d6f75', ...}}.get
